title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Phoenix Mills - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Phoenix Mills - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
